V0003_01_00_00_0.text: A true Duelist takes on all challengers, so I'll take ya on!

V0003_01_00_01_0.text: Step right up so I can knock ya down!

V0003_01_00_03_0.text: Yuge! You promised that you'd Duel me, and it's time to pay up!

V0003_01_00_04_0.text: Kaiba! It's time I put your stinkin' mug in its place!

V0003_01_00_05_0.text: I thought I smelled a dung beetle.

V0003_01_00_05_1.text: I'll show dis Duelin' disgrace who's boss!

V0003_01_00_06_0.text: Mai, show me what ya got!

V0003_01_00_06_1.text: 'Cause I'm gonna Duel to my last breath!

V0003_01_00_07_0.text: Listen up, ya bald-headed freak! I'm not scareda you!

V0003_01_00_08_0.text: I'll play your Shadow Game, ya freak!

V0003_01_00_08_1.text: It's time for da Rare Hunter to become da rare hunted!

V0003_01_00_09_0.text: I'd call ya a dirty rat, but I don't wanna insult da rats!

V0003_01_00_10_0.text:
C'mon, Tristan!
Ya know ya can't beat me!

V0003_01_00_11_0.text: If I'm gonna be a true Duelist, I can't lose to you!

V0003_01_00_12_0.text: Let's Duel fair and square, Espa Roba!

V0003_01_00_14_0.text: If there's a Duel to Duel, Joey Wheeler's your man!

V0003_01_00_15_0.text:
Serenity!
Comin' here means ya got da heart of a Duelist!

V0003_01_00_17_0.text: You Doma goons ain't gettin' away with nuthin'!

V0003_01_00_18_0.text:
Valon!
Dueling's about fightin' for those you care about!

V0003_01_00_19_0.text: If you're not backin' down, neither am I, Valon!

V0003_01_00_20_0.text:
Mai...
I gotta break her free from these Doma freaks!

V0003_01_00_21_0.text: If Duelin's the only way to get thru to ya, let's do dis!

V0003_01_00_22_0.text:
You joined Doma?
You always make da wrong decisions!

V0003_01_00_23_0.text:
You remind me a lot of Kaiba.
And dat ain't a compliment!

V0003_03_00_03_0.text: No one messes wit' Joey Wheeler!

V0003_03_00_04_0.text: I'm not givin' up 'cause losin' ain't in my dictionary!

V0003_03_00_05_0.text: Dis Duel ain't lookin' too good for me...

V0003_05_00_00_0.text: I can't afford to lose, so I gotta kick my game up a notch!

V0003_08_00_00_1.text: It's the Trap Card, Trap Hole!

V0003_08_00_02_0.text: I activate da Trap Card, Fairy Box!

V0003_08_00_02_1.text: Ya can't hit what ya can't see, hahahahaha!

V0003_08_00_03_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Giant Trunade!

V0003_08_00_04_0.text: I activate the Trap Card, Graverobber!

V0003_08_00_04_1.text: I steal 1 Spell Card from your Graveyard!

V0003_08_00_05_0.text: Here's the Spell Card - Graceful Dice!

V0003_08_00_05_1.text: It raises my monsters' Attack Points depending on what I roll!

V0003_08_00_06_0.text: I activate da Trap Card - Skull Dice!

V0003_08_00_06_1.text: This lowers your monsters' Attack Points dependin' on the number I roll!

V0003_08_00_07_0.text: Time to set ya free, Gearfried! I activate the Spell Card, Release Restraint!

V0003_08_00_08_0.text: The Continuous Spell, Dangerous Machine Type-6, activates!

V0003_08_00_09_0.text: I activate da Trap, Magical Arm Shield!

V0003_08_00_10_1.text: This switches the Attack and Defense Points of all monsters on the field!

V0003_08_00_10_2.text: This switcheroo spells trouble for you!

V0003_08_00_11_0.text: I activate da Spell Card, White Elephant's Gift!

V0003_08_00_12_0.text: I activate da Spell Card, Heart of the Underdog!

V0003_08_00_13_1.text: I activate da Trap, Kunai with Chain!

V0003_08_00_14_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Polymerization!

V0003_08_00_15_0.text: Gotta risk it all to win it all!

V0003_08_00_16_0.text: I can feel the power hidden inside dis card...

V0003_08_00_16_1.text: It's like nothin' I felt before! Claw of Hermos!

V0003_08_00_17_0.text: You ain't ready for dis! I activate my Ritual Spell Card!

V0003_08_00_18_0.text: I got a Question for ya!

V0003_08_00_18_1.text: What's da monster at da bottom of my Graveyard?

V0003_08_00_19_0.text: I'll use dis to send a monster to da Graveyard!

V0003_08_00_21_0.text: Dis is da perfect field for my monsters!

V0003_08_00_22_0.text:
I activate my Equip Spell!
Power 'em up, Salamandra!

V0003_08_00_24_0.text:
Electricity zaps when it's in water!
Lightning Blade!

V0003_08_00_25_0.text:
I activate my Trap Card!
Metalmorph!

V0003_08_00_26_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
The Warrior Returning Alive!

V0003_08_00_27_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Block Attack!

V0003_08_00_28_0.text: I activate da Spell Card, Stop Defense!

V0003_08_00_29_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Double Snare!

V0003_08_00_30_0.text: I knew includin' Mai's card in my Deck was da right move!

V0003_08_00_30_1.text: I activate da Spell Card, Harpie's Feather Duster!

V0003_08_00_31_0.text: I equip da Equip Spell, Dragon Nails on my monster!

V0003_08_00_33_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Knight's Title!

V0003_08_00_34_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Monster Reborn!

V0003_08_00_35_0.text:
I activate my Equip Spell!
Premature Burial!

V0003_08_00_36_0.text: I activate my Spell Card, Stray Lambs!

V0003_08_00_37_0.text:
I activate da Trap Card, Drop Off!
I won't let ya draw!

V0003_08_00_38_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Double Magical Arm Bind!

V0003_08_00_39_0.text:
Tricked ya!
Here's my Trap Card, Trap Hole of Spikes!

V0003_08_00_40_0.text:
I activate my Trap Card!
Nutrient Z!

V0003_08_00_41_0.text: My Trap Card, Bottomless Trap Hole!

V0003_08_00_42_0.text:
I activate my Continuous Spell!
Flame Swordsrealm!

V0003_08_00_43_0.text: I send a monster to da Grave to activate Flame Swordsrealm!

V0003_08_00_44_0.text:
Hope dis works!
I activate Flame Swordsrealm's effect!

V0003_08_00_45_0.text:
I activate my Equip Spell!
Salamandra Fusion!

V0003_08_00_46_0.text:
Here goes!
Da Quick-Play Spell, Fighting Flame Sword!

V0003_08_00_47_0.text:
I activate my Trap Card!
Flame Swordsdance!

V0003_08_00_48_0.text: I activate Flame Swordsdance's effect from da Graveyard!

V0003_08_00_49_0.text: I activate da Trap, Salamandra with Chain!

V0003_08_00_50_0.text: I activate Salamandra with Chain's effect from da Graveyard!

V0003_08_00_51_0.text: I activate my Trap, Max Metalmorph!

V0003_08_00_52_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Flame Coating Metalmorph!

V0003_08_00_53_0.text: I activate da Trap, Time Engine!

V0003_08_00_54_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Red-Eyes Insight!

V0003_08_00_55_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Red-Eyes Fusion!

V0003_08_00_56_0.text:
Now for my Spell Card!
Cards of the Red Stone!

V0003_08_00_57_0.text:
I activate my Ritual Spell!
Dark Dragon Ritual!

V0003_08_00_58_0.text: I activate Dark Dragon Ritual's effect from da Graveyard!

V0003_08_00_59_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Red-Eyes Fang with Chain!

V0003_08_00_60_0.text: Red-Eyes Fang with Chain has another effect!

V0003_08_00_61_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Red-Eyes Spirit!

V0003_08_00_62_0.text: I activate da Trap, Red-Eyes Burn!

V0003_08_00_63_0.text: I activate da Continuous Trap Card, Return of the Red-Eyes!

V0003_08_00_64_0.text: Return of the Red-Eyes's effect activates!

V0003_08_00_65_0.text: Return of the Red-Eyes activates when it's destroyed!

V0003_08_00_66_0.text:
I activate my Equip Spell!
WINDS OF VICTORY!

V0003_08_00_67_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Venomous Scorpion Trap!

V0003_08_00_68_0.text:
Time for my Trap Card!
Gamble!

V0003_08_00_68_1.text: If luck's on my side, dis coin will flip my way!

V0003_09_00_03_0.text: Gilford the Lightning's special ability activates!

V0003_09_00_03_1.text: Bring da thunder and rain down the pain!

V0003_09_00_04_0.text: When Blue Flame Swordsman is destroyed, his special ability activates.

V0003_09_00_06_0.text: Equip Cards slide right off Gearfried's iron armor!

V0003_09_00_07_0.text: When Gearfried the Swordmaster equips an Equip Card, it destroys one of your monsters!

V0003_09_00_08_1.text: It lets me copy your best card!

V0003_09_00_10_0.text: Rocket Warrior cuts your monster's ATK down!

V0003_09_00_11_0.text: I activate Red-Eyes Black Fullmetal Dragon from my hand!

V0003_09_00_12_0.text: Red-Eyes Black Fullmetal Dragon activates its effect!

V0003_09_00_13_0.text:
Red-Eyes Flare Metal Dragon!
Revive Red-Eyes!

V0003_09_00_14_0.text: Red-Eyes Slash Dragon equips a Warrior from my Graveyard!

V0003_09_00_15_0.text: Red-Eyes Slash Dragon sends an Equip Card to da Graveyard!

V0003_09_00_16_0.text: Red-Eyes Slash Dragon activates when it's destroyed!

V0003_09_00_17_0.text: I'll let ya wield da most powerful blade in da game!

V0003_09_00_17_1.text: I equip a monster with Red-Eyes Black Dragon Sword!

V0003_09_00_20_0.text: Red-Eyes Metal Claws Dragon's effect activates from my hand!

V0003_09_00_21_0.text: Red-Eyes Metal Claws Dragon activates its effect!

V0003_09_00_22_0.text: Red-Eyes Black Flare Dragon activates its effect!

V0003_09_00_23_0.text: I activate Red-Eyes Black Meteor Dragon from my hand!

V0003_09_00_24_0.text: Red-Eyes Black Meteor Dragon activates from da Graveyard!

V0003_09_00_25_0.text: Red-Eyes Archfiend of Lightning activates its effect!

V0003_09_00_27_0.text: Red-Eyes Retro Dragon's effect activates from my hand!

V0003_09_00_28_0.text: I Tribute Red-Eyes Retro Dragon to activate its effect!

V0003_09_00_29_0.text: Red-Eyes Baby Dragon activates its effect!

V0003_09_00_30_0.text: Red-Eyes Baby Dragon activates when it goes to da Graveyard!

V0003_09_00_31_0.text: I'm equippin' Black Metal Dragon on to a monster!

V0003_09_00_32_0.text: Black Metal Dragon activates when it's sent to da Graveyard!

V0003_09_00_33_0.text: I activate The Black Stone of Legend's effect!

V0003_09_00_34_0.text: I activate The Black Stone of Legend from my Graveyard!

V0003_09_00_35_0.text: I activate Black Dragon's Chick's effect!

V0003_09_00_36_0.text: Check out Lord of the Red's effect!

V0003_09_00_36_1.text: He uses his magical powers to destroy a monster!

V0003_09_00_37_0.text: Lord of the Red is usin' his effect!

V0003_09_00_38_0.text: Paladin of Dark Dragon activates his effect!

V0003_09_00_39_0.text: I activate Red-Eyes Dark Dragoon's effect!

V0003_09_00_40_0.text: Archfiend Black Skull Dragon activates its effect!

V0003_09_00_41_0.text: Meteor Black Comet Dragon activates its effect!

V0003_09_00_42_0.text: Meteor Black Comet Dragon activates from da Graveyard!

V0003_09_00_43_0.text: Immortal Phoenix Gearfried's effect activates from my hand!

V0003_09_00_44_0.text: I activate Immortal Phoenix Gearfried's effect!

V0003_09_00_47_0.text: Gearfried the Red-Eyes Iron Knight activates its effect!

V0003_09_00_48_0.text: Gearfried the Red-Eyes Iron Knight removes its Equip Card!

V0003_09_00_49_0.text: Ultimate Flame Swordsman activates his effect!

V0003_09_00_50_0.text: I activate Metalflame Swordsman's effect from my hand!

V0003_09_00_51_0.text: Ferocious Flame Swordsman activates his effect!

V0003_09_00_53_0.text: Fighting Flame Swordsman activates when he goes to da Grave!

V0003_09_00_54_0.text: I activate Fighting Flame Dragon's effect!

V0003_09_00_55_0.text: Dark Flare Knight activates when he's destroyed in battle!

V0003_09_00_56_0.text: Dark Flare Swordsman activates his effect from my hand!

V0003_09_00_57_0.text: I activate Dark Flare Swordsman's effect!

V0003_09_00_60_0.text: Legendary Knight Hermos activates his effect!

V0003_09_00_61_0.text: I activate Time Magic Hammer's effect!

V0003_09_00_62_0.text:
Rocket Hermos Cannon!
Equip on to a monster!

V0003_09_00_64_0.text: I'm gonna activate this fella's effect from my hand!

V0003_09_00_65_0.text: I activate Jinzo the Machine Menace's effect!

V0003_09_00_66_0.text:
Bugs bug me...
But I'm still usin' Insect Queen's effect!

V0003_09_00_69_0.text: Soul Spear's gonna strike his opponent down!

V0003_09_00_70_0.text:
Giltia the D. Knight - Soul Spear!
Activate your effect!

V0003_09_00_75_0.text: I activate Salamandra, the Flying Flame Dragon's effect!

V0003_09_00_78_0.text:
Time Wizard of Tomorrow!
It's all in your hands!

V0003_11_00_00_0.text: I Summon a monster in Attack Position!

V0003_11_01_00_0.text: I Summon a monster in Defense Position!

V0003_13_00_00_1.text: This pal o' mine's a super rare monster!

V0003_13_00_03_0.text: My legendary fighter has the power to control the skies and crush all your hopes!

V0003_13_00_04_0.text: My noble knight's strength comes straight from da heavens!

V0003_13_00_07_0.text: I Special Summon Red-Eyes Black Metal Dragon!

V0003_13_00_09_0.text: Shake off dem shackles, Gearfried the Swordmaster!

V0003_13_00_12_0.text: I don't know what dis weapon can do, but dat's never stopped me before!

V0003_13_00_15_1.text: Come on out, Lord of the Red!

V0003_13_00_22_0.text:
I'm playin' dis card!
Giltia the D. Knight!

V0003_13_00_23_0.text: Mako trusted me to use dis card right, so I'm gonna!

V0003_13_00_33_0.text:
My Red-Eyes is reborn!
Red-Eyes Slash Dragon!

V0003_13_00_36_0.text: Take to the skies, Red-Eyes Black Flare Dragon!

V0003_13_00_38_0.text:
Meteor Dragon Red-Eyes Impact!
Let's go!

V0003_13_00_39_0.text:
Rise up!
Red-Eyes Archfiend of Lightning!

V0003_13_00_41_0.text:
Dis is what I was waitin' for!
Red-Eyes Retro Dragon!

V0003_13_00_42_0.text:
Red-Eyes Baby Dragon!
You got dis!

V0003_13_00_43_0.text: I'm goin' with Black Metal Dragon!

V0003_13_00_44_0.text: I'm playin' The Black Stone of Legend!

V0003_13_00_45_0.text:
Black Dragon's Chick!
Get on da field!

V0003_13_00_52_0.text: Get ready for Gearfried the Red-Eyes Iron Knight!

V0003_13_00_53_0.text:
Oh yeah!
Here comes Ultimate Flame Swordsman!

V0003_13_00_55_0.text:
Check dis out!
Ferocious Flame Swordsman!

V0003_13_00_62_0.text: I can sure use your help!

V0003_13_00_68_0.text: Giltia the D. Knight - Soul Spear!

V0003_13_00_69_0.text:
I'm countin' on ya!
Time Wizard of Tomorrow!

V0003_13_00_73_0.text:
This'll show that Mai has my back!
Cyber Harpie Lady!

V0003_13_00_77_0.text:
This is gonna be awesome!
Marauding Captain!

V0003_13_00_81_0.text: Now's da perfect time for Metal Illusionist!

V0003_13_00_83_0.text: I Special Summon a Sheep Token!

V0003_13_00_84_0.text: I Special Summon a Lamb Token!

V0003_15_00_00_0.text: All right, you asked for it!

V0003_16_00_00_0.text: Time for you to hit da bricks!

V0003_18_00_00_0.text: I attack your Life Points directly!

V0003_18_00_01_0.text: My monster attacks your Life Points directly!

V0003_19_00_04_0.text: I attack with Gilford the Lightning!

V0003_19_00_08_0.text: I attack with Red-Eyes Black Metal Dragon!

V0003_19_00_11_0.text: Rocket Warrior, transform to Invincible Mode!

V0003_19_00_14_0.text: I attack with Fiendish Engine Ω!

V0003_19_00_32_0.text:
Red-Eyes Metal Claws Dragon!
Tear 'em up!

V0003_19_00_35_0.text:
Go, Meteor Dragon!
Strike at supersonic speed!

V0003_19_00_41_0.text:
The Black Stone of Legend!
Attack!

V0003_19_00_43_0.text: Get ready, Lord of the Red!

V0003_19_00_45_0.text:
Red-Eyes Dark Dragoon!
Do your thing!

V0003_19_00_47_0.text:
Meteor Black Comet Dragon!
Get attackin'!

V0003_19_00_51_0.text:
Gearfried the Red-Eyes Iron Knight!
Attack!

V0003_19_00_82_0.text:
Salamandra, the Flying Flame Dragon!
Torch 'em!

V0003_19_00_86_0.text: I attack with my Lamb Token!

V0003_21_00_00_0.text: Heheh, I end my turn. You're up!

V0003_21_00_03_0.text: Every time I Duel, I get stronger than before!

V0003_21_00_04_0.text: Dat's all I can do for now.

V0003_21_00_05_0.text: I'll never think about givin' up!

V0003_27_00_00_0.text: Argh... I don't like my odds...

V0003_27_00_01_0.text: I can't lose to da likes of you!

V0003_28_00_00_0.text: I won because you weren't just Dueling me.

V0003_28_00_00_1.text: You were Dueling a whole team! My buddies always have my back!

V0003_28_00_01_0.text: Too bad! Sometimes dem's the breaks!

V0003_28_00_02_1.text: Dat's some Joey magic right dere!

V0003_28_00_03_0.text: It's been an honor ta Duel ya, Mako!

V0003_28_00_04_0.text: It's not that I'm too strong...

V0003_28_00_04_1.text: It's that you're too weak, bug boy!

V0003_28_00_05_0.text: Can ya say vic-to-ry for J-o-ey!

V0003_28_00_06_0.text: Welcome to Loserville, Marik! Population - you!

V0003_28_00_07_0.text: Yuge! Dat was a Duel for the ages!

V0003_28_00_08_0.text:
Hahahaha!
C'mon, Tristan!
Ya think I'll lose to an amateur?

V0003_28_00_09_0.text:
Heh! How's dat!
My game's on point!

V0003_28_00_11_0.text: There's always a chance ta win if ya never give up!

V0003_28_00_12_0.text: You really look like Princess Adena, your highness.

V0003_28_00_13_0.text: I don't have time ta lose to chumps like you!

V0003_28_00_14_0.text:
Ya fought like a true Duelist.
With determination and heart.

V0003_28_00_15_0.text:
I'll always stand by ya.
Cuz I never forget our friendship.

V0003_28_00_16_0.text: Underneath all dat anger and frustration is a good person.

V0003_28_00_17_0.text:
Everyone wants to be a hero.
But they don't act like one!

V0003_28_00_18_0.text: Joining Doma means you're Duelin' for da wrong reasons!

V0003_29_00_00_0.text: Ya win some, ya lose some.

V0003_29_00_01_0.text: I hate to admit it, but ya got the better of me dis time.

V0003_29_00_03_0.text: I gave it my all, but it still wasn't enough...

V0003_29_00_04_1.text: You took me down like a champ!

V0003_29_00_05_0.text: Marik... I'll put an end to your evil someday...

V0003_29_00_06_0.text: The ONE Duelist I didn't wanna lose to! Argh! I'll never hear de end of dis!

V0003_29_00_07_0.text: Dat's why you're da one and only King of Games! Thanks for da Duel, Yuge!

V0003_29_00_08_0.text:
I lost to Tristan...
I'll never get over this...

V0003_29_00_11_0.text: Just gotta keep pickin' myself up 'til I get dat win!

V0003_29_00_13_0.text:
This is how it ends?
With Doma gettin' da better of me?

V0003_29_00_14_0.text: You sure have faith in your skills to take dem risks!

V0003_29_00_15_0.text:
I never knew you were so unhappy.
We coulda helped ya, Mai!

V0003_29_00_16_0.text:
Congratulations. You win.
See ya around.

V0003_29_00_17_0.text: If one of us had to lose our soul...

V0003_29_00_17_1.text: I'm just glad that it didn't have to be you, Mai.

V0003_29_00_18_0.text: Is it worth riskin' your soul for a chance to defeat me?

V0003_30_00_01_0.text: Losin' your confidence, huh? Maybe 'cause your strategies are whack!

V0003_30_00_02_0.text: Stumped, are ya? Want me to give ya some tips?

V0003_33_00_02_0.text: Time to get my motor runnin'!

V0003_34_00_00_0.text: According to my math, you're gonna be all washed up in eleven turns!

V0003_34_00_01_0.text: You're like the 21st person I've ever met who's makin' me break a sweat!

V0003_34_00_02_0.text: Hey, I'm a Duelist too! I'm not gonna just sit around and let ya beat me!

V0003_34_00_03_0.text: I'm takin' a chance - I hope it pays off!

V0003_34_00_04_0.text: How am I supposed to win... But I can't let my opponent smell my fear!

V0003_34_00_05_0.text: Maybe I don't have what it takes to win...

V0003_34_00_07_0.text: Hehehe! Ya betta watch your step because I laid a trap!

V0003_34_00_08_0.text: Heh heh... I just thought of somethin', and you ain't gonna like it!

V0003_34_00_09_0.text: I'm on fire and gonna kick your keister!

V0003_34_00_10_0.text: Joey Wheeler's in da best shape 'a his career!

V0003_34_00_12_0.text: Even if ya cheat, I'll still take ya down!

V0003_34_00_14_0.text: I don't let freaky-lookin' frauds get da best 'a me!

V0003_36_00_00_0.text: You can mop 'em up for me!

V0003_36_00_01_0.text:
It's your turn.
Stay on guard!

V0003_36_00_02_0.text:
Sorry...
But I know you got dis!

V0003_36_00_04_0.text:
Okay!
I'm passin' the baton to you!

V0003_36_00_05_0.text: Sorry I put ya in dis mess, Yugi.

V0003_36_00_07_0.text: Don't make any dumb mistakes, Tristan!

V0003_36_00_09_0.text:
We're one step from a win!
You can do it, Serenity!

V0003_36_00_10_0.text:
You're up, Serenity.
Just believe in yourself.

V0003_36_00_11_0.text:
Don't give up, Serenity!
I'm here with ya all the way!

V0003_39_00_69_0.text:
Oh yeah!
I get ta draw cards!

V0003_39_00_70_0.text:
You gotta be kiddin'...
I hafta skip my next turn...

V0003_49_00_00_0.text:
Aww yeah!
I was born for dis!
